findings.issue: Task step 3 and Verification Steps suggest `./noisia --help`, but the Makefile `build` target outputs the binary to `bin/noisia` (CGO_ENABLED=0 ... -o bin/${APPNAME} ./cmd), not the repo root. The task already hedges with '(или путь к собранному бинарю)', so this is not blocking.
findings.fix: Run `./bin/noisia --help` after `make build`, or use `go run ./cmd --help`.

findings.issue: `make lint` runs `golangci-lint run`. The binary is not on the default PATH; it exists at $(go env GOPATH)/bin/golangci-lint. If GOPATH/bin is not exported on PATH, `make lint` will fail with command-not-found, which is an environment issue, not a code FAIL.
findings.fix: Ensure $(go env GOPATH)/bin is on PATH before running `make lint`, or invoke the binary by full path. Do not classify a missing-tool error as an AC FAIL.
